title: NEO AUTO-MODE engine auto-keep record (NEO_AUTOMODE_DESIGN_v1 rev5 sec 4)
_home: <RunRoot>/engine_auto_keep.json (written by the orch_run.ps1 END decision consumer under a VALID AUTO chain on a clean converged GO; RunRoot ONLY - never .neo/)
_status: INSTALLED slice-1d 2026-07-08 (spec sha8 4F549F3A; ADDITIVE schema-add recorded with the v7 stop-and-wait ledger). This is a RUN-EVIDENCE record, NOT a gate/freeze/verdict record: the run is honestly 'engine-kept, human review pending' until Raphael's async review appends his own human record. INV-A1: the engine never writes neo:human_gate_ledger; downstream consumers that REQUIRE a human keep (dependent continuation, graduation, PROD promote) refuse this record as a substitute (D-A2 default, NF-A6).

decided_by.description: Structurally non-confusable with a human principal; a human keep is a neo:human_gate_ledger entry, never this record.

freeze_record_sha256.description: The C5-bound clarity freeze record_sha256 (re-read from disk at the END decision site).

autonomy_sha256.description: The sec-3A per-run autonomy record hash (END-site re-hash from disk; two DISTINCT named artifacts - cold-audit LOW-6).

trail_ref.description: Where the review trail lives for the MANDATORY async human review.

notify_outcome.description: Outcome of the AUTO-KEPT notification attempt (SENT / DEDUPED / NOT-SENT + reason). A send failure never blocks the keep but IS recorded (convenience never authority).

human_review.description: Always 'pending' at write time; the engine never marks its own review complete.
